chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 3630 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 3. For hearing on MA No.15764/2017 25.01.2018. Mr. Mazhar Ali Laghari Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w SIP Shamsher Ali on behalf of SHO P.S.Tando M.Khan -=-=- Learned Asstt:A.G files comments of respondent No.1 which is taken on record, copy whereof supplied to the learned counsel for the petitioner. Through this petition, main grievance of the petitioner is that although the petitioner has registered the case being crime No.202 of 2017 at police station Tando Muhammad Khan Us 392, 34 PPC against Ayaz Ali but local police is not arresting him. Learned Asstt:A.G has pointed out that accused Ayaz Ali has been arrested on 20.12.2017 and he has been produced before the court of law. Further grievance of the petitioner is that local police has lodged false FIR against the petitioner being crime NO.334 of 2017 U/s 379, 411 PPC at police station Tando Muhammad Khan. Investigating Officer of the case present in court submits that case under crime NO.334/2017 has already been challanned. Under the circumstances this petition appears to achieve its purpose, therefore, same stands dismissed alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
